The Space

Curated for Comfort

Every detail of Generations Getaway LLC has been thoughtfully appointed — a refined urban oasis where timeless elegance, a heated pool, and spa create the ultimate city escape.

Outdoor Living Space
Fort Lauderdale

Local Highlights

Step outside and discover what Fort Lauderdale has to offer — world-class dining, culture, and entertainment just moments from your private oasis.

01
Las Olas Boulevard
10 min drive

Fort Lauderdale’s premier dining and shopping destination — award-winning restaurants, boutiques, and galleries lining a stunning waterfront boulevard.

02
Fort Lauderdale Beach
12 min drive

World-famous white sand beaches stretching miles along the Atlantic coast — perfect for sunrise walks, watersports, and sunset dining.

03
Riverwalk Arts District
8 min drive

A vibrant cultural corridor featuring the Broward Center for Performing Arts, NSU Art Museum, and waterfront dining along the New River.

04
Wilton Manors
5 min drive

A lively, welcoming neighborhood packed with independent restaurants, bars, and unique shops — just minutes from your door.

05
Hugh Taylor Birch State Park
10 min drive

A beautiful urban oasis with nature trails, kayaking, and picnic areas — a peaceful escape nestled between the beach and the Intracoastal.

06
Port Everglades
15 min drive

One of the world’s busiest cruise ports — perfect for day trips to the Bahamas or watching massive ships navigate the channel.

Ready for Your Escape?

Generations Getaway LLC offers an unmatched urban oasis experience in the heart of Fort Lauderdale. Your private heated pool and spa await.
